series_metadata.series_description: Attorney research information compiled in the process of developing a rule, including attorney-client communication and attorney work product.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office until rule is rescinded, then destroy file. If more than two revisions occur to an active rule, destroy the research files prior to the last 2 revisions. ; Electronic: In office until rule is rescinded, then destroy file. If more than two revisions occur to an active rule, destroy the research files prior to the last 2 revisions., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
